message:
feat(test): add no-mock integration tests and E2E logging

- Add ProcessHarness-based tests for /proc, net, cgroup collectors
- Add real-system tests for signal actions and zombie verification
- Wire up JSONL logging in main.rs for E2E tests
- Fix re-exports in collect/mod.rs to expose parsers
- Add CLI E2E tests validating JSON output and logging

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+//! Shared test helpers for pt-core integration tests.
+
+pub mod live_harness;
